title: Canopy Growth (CGC) Q1 Earnings: Revenue Beat Amid Continued Losses
text: Canopy Growth Corporation reported first-quarter results that exceeded revenue expectations but continued to show losses. The company posted a loss of $0.14 per share, outperforming the consensus estimate of a $0.15 loss, representing a 6.67% earnings surprise. The cannabis producer generated $52.13 million in quarterly revenue, surpassing analyst expectations by 8.81%. This marked a year-over-year increase from $48.39 million in the prior-year period. The company has topped revenue estimates twice over the last four quarters. Shares have declined approximately 61.7% since the start of 2025, significantly underperforming the S&P 500's 7.8% gain. The stock received a Zacks Rank #5 (Strong Sell) rating, indicating expected underperformance. The Medical Products industry segment ranks in the bottom 39% of industries tracked by Zacks.
